description_long: This kiosk features a prominent vertical display wall adorned with a vibrant butterfly-themed graphic, including the text 'BUTTERFLIES OF THE NIGHT' and descriptive information about the exhibit. The front counter is rectangular with a matching butterfly motif, providing a surface for interaction or display. Several three-dimensional butterfly models are suspended in mid-air, enhancing the immersive, nature-inspired theme. The structure is set on a flat, dark brown platform, with the main display wall supported by visible rear braces. The materials appear to be primarily printed composite panels and lightweight metal framing, with some plastic or resin elements for the butterflies. The overall design is sleek and modern, intended to attract attention in public or event spaces.
description: A modern kiosk with a butterfly-themed graphic wall, matching counter, and suspended butterfly models, set on a dark platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main graphic wall with butterfly imagery and text, a matching counter, and several butterfly models in front.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the counter, the suspended butterflies, and the supporting braces behind the main wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the graphic wall with visible support braces and no signage or counter.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the counter's side, the floating butterflies, and the structural supports behind the wall.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the front and main vertical wall, featuring the text 'BUTTERFLIES OF THE NIGHT' and descriptive information, with butterfly graphics.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof formed by the top of the vertical display wall and counter, no overhangs or decorative elements.
